---
name: Security report
about: DO NOT use this template — see SECURITY.md
title: "[security]: please email instead — DO NOT submit"
labels: ["security", "do-not-merge"]
---

> **STOP.** Security issues must NOT be filed as public GitHub Issues.
>
> Public Issues are publicly visible — disclosing a vulnerability here puts
> every PRL Wallet user at risk before a fix can be released.
>
> Please email **security@pearlkeeper.com** instead. See
> [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md) for the full disclosure flow,
> supported versions, and response SLA.
>
> If you have already opened this issue, please close it and email us.
